name: arbor
description: Initialize Arbor state and run minimal framework checks for AGENTS.md, project memory, Claude bridge files, and project-level hooks.

interface.longDescription: Arbor is a lightweight context layer for Codex and Claude Code. It initializes AGENTS.md, .arbor/memory.md, CLAUDE.md, and project-level hook wrappers, then checks those surfaces with one deterministic framework report. It does not provide planning, coding, review, release, project-summary, health, or maintenance workflows.
defaultPrompt: Run a minimal Arbor framework check for managed files and project hooks
Repair missing Arbor framework files and project hook wrappers
